---
title: "State Of The Region"
editor: visual
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(plotly)
library(dplyr)

qcew_data <- readRDS("data/qcew.rds")

# Ensure proper ordering
qcew_data <- qcew_data %>%
  arrange(year, quarter)

# Get counties
counties <- unique(qcew_data$county)

# Default county
default_county <- "Kalamazoo"

# Initial dataset
initial_data <- qcew_data %>%
  filter(county == default_county)

# Create plot
fig <- plot_ly()

# County bars
fig <- fig %>%
  add_trace(
    data = initial_data,
    x = ~date,
    y = ~avg_wkly_wage,
    type = "bar",
    name = default_county
  )

# State line
fig <- fig %>%
  add_trace(
    data = initial_data,
    x = ~date,
    y = ~state_avg_wkly_wage,
    type = "scatter",
    mode = "lines",
    name = "Michigan Average"
  )

# Dropdown buttons
buttons <- lapply(seq_along(counties), function(i) {

  county_name <- counties[i]

  county_data <- qcew_data %>%
    filter(county == county_name)

  list(
    method = "update",
    args = list(
      list(
        y = list(
          county_data$avg_wkly_wage,
          county_data$state_avg_wkly_wage
        ),
        x = list(
          county_data$date,
          county_data$date
        )
      ),
      list(
        title = paste(
          "Average Weekly Wage:",
          county_name,
          "County vs Michigan"
        )
      )
    ),
    label = county_name
  )
})

# Layout
fig <- fig %>%
  layout(
    title = paste(
      "Average Weekly Wage:",
      default_county,
      "County vs Michigan"
    ),
    
    updatemenus = list(
      list(
        active = which(counties == default_county) - 1,
        buttons = buttons,
        x = 1.25,
        y = .75,
        xanchor = "right"
      )
    ),
    
    annotations = list(
      list(
        text = "Source: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA), FRED",
        xref = "paper",
        yref = "paper",
        x = 0,
        y = -0.35,
        showarrow = FALSE,
        xanchor = "left",
        font = list(size = 10)
      )
    ),
    
    margin = list(
      t = 30,
      b = 160
    ),
    
    xaxis = list(title = "Date"),
    
    yaxis = list(
      title = "Average Weekly Wage ($)"
    ),
    
    barmode = "group"
  )

config(fig,
       displayModeBar = FALSE)

```
